task: Implement Phase I Evolution Upgrades: Visual Grid & Double-Loop Compiler
pattern: Using Windows GDI+ drawing in native PowerShell for screenshot grids bypasses heavy Node module setups (node-canvas/Jimp) completely, optimizing agent execution. Integrating verification checks (tsc --noEmit) immediately after edit nodes ensures zero regression loops reach approval gates.
logic_shift: Replaced external visual parsing with native grid center-mapping coordinates to translate user visual cues (A1-L8) to precise pixel clicks in a single action, eliminating coordinate drift on high-DPI Windows screens.
